notes: Recovery phase initiated. Kill switch invoked on EU pricing — all cosmetic bundles rolled back to NA-parity pricing within 2 hours of DLR-0034 ratification. EU DAU stabilized at 299K (still -14% vs baseline but no longer falling). EU churn slowed from 8.2% to 5.8%. Refund rate halved from 6.8% to 3.2% as goodwill credit program (DLR-0035) took effect. JP localization hotfix deployed, resolving DRIFT-0017 (currency symbol errors). SAI dropped to 58 as APAC capacity expansion (DLR-0031) completed — Tokyo relay latency normalized. DRIFT-0018 flagged sponsor contract exposure: two esports sponsors (combined $30M annual) flagged 'brand safety' concerns over the pricing controversy. DLR-0036 ratified sponsor communication protocol and renegotiation timeline. Canon alignment improving as pricing canon updated, but EU trust deficit persists.
